title: Blessing Of Keep
description: Adds an enchantment that makes you keep your items after death
body:
Adds the blessing of keep! an enchantment acquired from an enchantment table (I think, havent tested it yet) and librarian villager (confirmed!). After you die, while having this enchantment, you will keep it! its like selective keep inventory. only works in 1.21+.





UPDATE!!:
Basically rewrote the whole pack so now its dynamic and actually usable, its still gonna spawn 2 chest minecarts for every player, but now it removes it if someone doesnt have an item with the Blessing Of Keep enchantment, if a player leaves while having the enchantment the minecarts will stay.


Disclaimer for 1.0 (redundant if you update to 2.0)

~~DISCLAIMER:
due to the way the system works, it only works for 30 unique players. adding more is possible, but 1, laggy as it requires 2 chest minecarts for every person, 2, time consuming. and its just pretty badly made. Its just a proof of concept and to see what I can do.~~

Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) where this mod was even requested! You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
